hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(py)$' && echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(backend|shared)/' && uv run python -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 | head -20 || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$' && echo "$f" | grep -q '/frontend/' && cd frontend && pnpm tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; }
